pages.text: The $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() — any logs and dirt. Fell a $(item)forest$() first; bigger and pricier.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

The Forest Island writ large — radius 13–17, a deeper core, more coal and iron to match its size. Like the small one it always grows a forest and takes cues from the biome: the local tree species, a pond in watery biomes, sandy ground on beaches and in deserts.$(br2)Crafted from any logs — any tree — so harvest a tree first.
